observations.polarity: Conflict between serving a fallen temple deity and a higher god
observations.summary: The speaker challenges the loyalty to a deity whose temple has fallen due to a 'blinded man,' questioning why service should be given to this deity rather than to El, who dwells higher.

left_evidence.quote: Your temple fell because of a blinded man," he snarled, the hesitation hardening. "You crumpled before the sacred chest.

right_evidence.quote: Why should I serve you rather than El, who dwells higher?
